name: manfredi
description: Working Claude Code kits from a real agency operator: the scaffold, the sales-call reader, the content engine starter, the AI-tell stripper, and the client onboarding stack. Versioned, and bumped when the model era shifts.

plugins.name: agency-starter
plugins.description: The memory tiers, project scaffold, guard hooks, and 14 working skills I run my agency's Claude Code on. Drops in in about 15 minutes.

plugins.name: drop-point-read
plugins.description: Reads one sales call transcript and names the exact line where the deal slipped, scored against your own best closes.

plugins.name: content-engine-starter
plugins.description: The skeleton of a Claude-run LinkedIn content engine: 6 pipeline prompts, anti-slop checklist, pillars, and the buyer-fit scoring rubric.

plugins.name: strip-ai-tells
plugins.description: A line editor that finds the 14 tells that make AI-written copy obvious and rewrites them out, one pass per draft.

plugins.name: client-onboarding
plugins.description: A skill plus four stage agents that run a signed client from intake form to first deliverables, with the founder as the approve gate.
